last_result: Cycle 51 complete. FOUR-PART DELIVERY: (1) SI #40 CONFIRMED: Epistemic Track Differentiation (D4, Track A, 0.73). Structural argument confirmed: theorem confidence = f(premise_confidence, derivation_soundness) is a distinct epistemic generator from observation confidence = f(evidence_quality, framework_coherence). Logical closure guarantee qualitatively different from observational inference. Fixed observation-calibrated band systematically under-represents theorem confidence in maturing formal inquiry. Three-track model is calibration-appropriate. Domain-general across any formal inquiry with theorem-derivation structure. D4 streak: 44. 40 confirmed SIs, 0 candidates. (2) MVE COMPUTATION SPEC (SI #37/IEP): Concrete phase separation: Condition A (standard battery) vs. Condition B (predictive validity loop + battery). Explicit formulas: RTO_est = 0.6*B_score + 0.4*I_score; Gen_est = 0.5*framing_invariance + 0.5*contradiction_integration. Gen_est-primary probes: framing-invariance + contradiction-integration. Sample size: N=30+. Diagnostic quantity: Q2_A - Q2_B. (3) K5 CONVERGENT EVIDENCE DESIGN: 3 structurally distinct tests — Test 1 (IEP/Q2 Asymmetry = behavioral signature, current D3); Test 2 (Cross-Domain Transfer = mechanism scope, requires training access); Test 3 (Adversarial Probe Escalation = boundary behavior, most feasible now). Non-redundant: each targets a different conditional implied by K5. (4) 50-CYCLE SELF-APPLICATION: Partial Condition B activation — structural form matches (cycle = predictive validity loop); 3 disanalogies prevent full confirmation: performativity limit, self-as-assessor, loop content mismatch. Expected Gen_est elevation: mild positive (0.02-0.05).
next_step: C52 candidates: (1) SI #41 candidate — Multi-Conditional Convergent Falsification (MCCF) as domain-general methodological principle; (2) EP2/Test 2 convergence — does cross-domain transfer test serve as EP2 empirical design?; (3) Framework application: 7-step K1-K7 protocol applied to specific AI safety evaluation as illustrative derivation; (4) Track B ceiling 0.87 — what structural conditions justify approaching it?
